name: WalkMe
description: WalkMe — Digital adoption platform with in-app guidance, automation, analytics, and workflow assistance for enterprise SaaS.

seo.title: WalkMe — Push / In-app Messaging SDK
seo.meta_description: WalkMe: WalkMe — Digital adoption platform with in-app guidance, automation, analytics, and workflow assistance for enterprise SaaS.

when_to_use: In-app guidance and workflow automation for enterprise SaaS
Digital adoption analytics for complex enterprise software
Employee onboarding automation for internal IT applications

pros: Deep coverage across any web app, including SAP/Salesforce
Analytics show real adoption and drop-off
cons: Selector-based overlays break on app changes
review.verdict: DAP heavyweight for enterprise IT; wrong fit for product teams — Userflow or Chameleon cover that.
review.best_for: Enterprises driving adoption on Salesforce, Workday, SAP
review.not_for: Startups or product-led teams on a budget

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: custom pricing alone is not HWM evidence

lock_in.reason: Enterprise DAP, flows tied to platform
